suspected_lcp_element: LCP is primarily the critical hero text overlay, but the render thread is blocked heavily by WebGL initialization.
bottleneck_identified: Significant Total Blocking Time (TBT) and Largest Contentful Paint (LCP) regression risk due to synchronous `THREE.WebGLRenderer` initialization inside `Hero.tsx` `useEffect`. The heavy WebGL instantiation blocks the main thread during initial page load, delaying the painting of critical text and interactive elements.
fix_applied: Modified `app/components/scrollytelling/Hero.tsx` to defer the initialization of the Three.js scene, camera, renderer, and related logic by 2 seconds (`setTimeout(initWebGL, 2000)`).
expected_improvement: Dramatically improves LCP, TBT, and potentially INP by yielding the main thread during the critical rendering path. The browser can prioritize painting the hero text, processing LCP events, and handling immediate user interactions before the heavy WebGL canvas initializes in the background.
how_to_verify: 1. Run `pnpm dev`. 2. Open `http://localhost:3000`. 3. Open Chrome DevTools > Performance and record a page load. 4. Verify that the initial page load has minimal blocking time before the first paint, and the WebGL canvas initializes seamlessly a few seconds later.
